name: Starbucks' Date Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the all-purpose and whole wheat flours, bran, baking powder, soda, salt, cinnamon, and brown sugar in a bowl.
2. Add the butter to the flour mixture. If using a food processor, process until crumbly; otherwise, cut the butter into the flour mixture by hand until combined.
3. Stir in the egg, buttermilk, and chopped dates. Mix gently until just combined, adding a few more tablespoons of flour if needed for a workable consistency.
4. Shape the dough into a rectangle about 1 inch thick on a floured surface.
5. Cut the dough into 12 triangles.
6. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 25 minutes.
7. Cool on a rack.
